raw_response: Given your high quality sensitivity and brand familiarity with Sony, the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones are an excellent choice for commuting. They offer industry-leading noise cancellation and a comfortable lightweight design, ensuring you can enjoy clear sound even in noisy environments. With a battery life of 30 hours, these headphones will last through long commutes without needing a recharge. Although they are slightly above your budget at $348, their premium features make them worth the investment for someone who prioritizes quality over cost.
